name: Game Your Game Inc.
business: We are a corporation that develops and markets an AI-based sports performance tracking technology that is primarily focused in the golf industry. We generate revenue from the sale of hardware devices and recurring annual subscription fees for software access. Our products are sold direct-to-consumer via online platforms and targeted to golfers, coaches, and golf facilities.

exposures.sentence: Our KZNâ„¢ AI system is a hardware -based product incorporating embedded neural network technology designed to detect and associate golf shot events with course location data during play.

The system includes smart sensors and a GPS tracking device designed to automatically detect, classify, and record shot events during a round of golf. The smart sensors incorporate accelerometer and gyroscope components and utilize embedded neural network algorithms designed to determine whether a swing event constitutes a shot.

catalysts.event: General release of GameGolf KZN AI device and mobile apps in Q3 2026
catalysts.sentence: We launched a beta version of the KZA AI device in May 2025 to our legacy product user base and expect to launch the GameGolf KZN AI device and associated iOS and Android mobile apps for general release in the third quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Second closing of Series A Preferred Stock financing upon commencement of trading
catalysts.sentence: At the second closing, which will occur upon the commencement of trading of our shares of common stock as a result of this direct listing, we will issue 8,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock to Streeterville for a purchase price of $8,000,000.

tamClaims.claim: The global golf and rangefinder market is projected at USD$68.8 million in 2025, with an expected 3.55% CAGR through 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: The global golf and rangefinder market is projected at USD$68.8 million in 2025, with an expected 3.55% CAGR through 2033 (MarketResearch.com).
